ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performance_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance test */,
  "nthreads" INTEGER /* Number of threads used in the test */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy consumed during the test (in Joules) */,
  "time" REAL /* Execution time of the test (in seconds) */,
  "power" REAL /* Power usage during the test (in Watts) */,
  "speedup" REAL /* Speedup achieved compared to a baseline */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was run */,
  "test_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the test for reference */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Information about the environment where the test was conducted */,
  "test_status" TEXT /* Status of the test (e.g., completed, in progress, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration settings used in the tests */,
  "hardware_model" TEXT /* Model of the hardware used */,
  "software_version" TEXT /* Version of the software used */,
  "additional_notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or remarks about the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding performance test */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration used for the test */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the test results */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the results were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, analyst, admin) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benchmarks" (
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benchmark */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the benchmark */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the benchmark */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of benchmark (e.g., CPU, memory, I/O) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benchmark_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_benchmarks" (
  "test_benchmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test-benchmark link */,
  "test_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding performance test */,
  "benchmark_id" INTEGER /* ID of the benchmark used for the test */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_benchmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_benchmarks_test_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_id") REFERENCES performance_tests ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_benchmarks_benchmark_id FOREIGN KEY ("benchmark_id") REFERENCES benchmarks ("benchmark_id")
)
